WTT 1 (sr), ?nftw 01.01.2003 g[PT wrfSRr f¥n w «TT sftr (i) ^T.3TT. 247 (3T), mftw 28 T ^ f t , 2003; (ii) ^T. sir. 430 (3T), crrttw 10 3T^r, 2003; (iii) ^T.3ff. 270 (3T), ?nftW 27 <T^rft, 2004; (iv) ^T.3TT. 1170 (3T),?nftW 20 3T^5T, 2004; (v) ^\M. 1017 (3T), ?nftw 15 1 ^ , 2005; sffc (vi) ^T.STT. 1012 (3T),?nftw 15 srtw, 2015. MINISTRY OF COMMERCE AND INDUSTRY (Department of Commerce) Notification New Delhi, the 1st October, 2015 S.O. 2688(E).––In exercise of the powers conferred by sub-sections (3) and (5) of section 30 of the Tea Act, 1953 (29 of 1953), the Central Government hereby makes the following amendments further to amend the Tea (Marketing) Control Order, 2003, namely:- 1. (1) This order may be called the Tea (Marketing) Control (Second Amendment) Order, 2015. (2) It shall come into force on the date of its publication in the Official Gazette. 2. In the Tea (Marketing) Control Order, 2003 (hereinafter referred to as the said order), in paragraph 2, for clause (q), the following clause shall be substituted, namely:– ‘(q) “Bought leaf tea factory” means a tea factory which sources not less than fifty-one per cent. of its tea leaf requirement from other tea growers during any calendar year for the purpose of manufacture of tea;’. 3. For paragraph 17 of the said order, the following paragraph shall be substituted, namely:–– “17. Fees – Every application for the issue of a licence or registration or renewal thereof shall be accompanied by such fees as may be prescribed from time to time by the Licensing Authority or the Registering Authority with the prior approval of the Central Government.”. 4. In paragraph 21 of the said order, for sub-paragraph (1), the following sub-paragraph shall be substituted, namely:–– “(1) Every registered tea manufacturer shall, on and from the date of commencement of this notification, sell not less than fifty per cent. of the total tea manufactured in a calendar year through public tea auctions in India, held under the control or auspices of organisers of tea auction licensed to do so under the provisions of this order: Provided that the Registering Authority may, from time to time, revise such percentage with the prior approval of the Central Government.”. [F.No.T-12014/1/2013-Plant (A)] RAJANI RANJAN RASHMI, Additional Secretary -- 2 of 3 -- [ W I I - ^ I 1 ^ 3(ii)] TOT ^T u^m : sTOT^rrm 3 Note: The principal order was published in the Gazette of India, Extraordinary, Part-II, Section 3, Sub-section (ii) vide number S.O. 1(E), dated the 1st January, 2003 and subsequently amended vide the following notifications,- (i) S.O. 247(E), dated the 28th February, 2003; (ii) S.O. 430(E), dated the 10th April, 2003; (iii) S.O. 270(E), dated the 27th February, 2004; (iv) S.O. 1170(E), dated the 20th October, 2004; (v) S.O. 1017(E), dated the 15th July, 2005; and (vi) S.O. 1012(E) dated the 15th April, 2015. Printed by the Manager, Government of India Press, Ring Road, Mayapuri, New Delhi-110064 and Published by the Controller of Publications, Delhi-110054. -- 3 of 3 --
